productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Green Sweater
description: CompositionGreen sweater made of 100% cotton, has a v-neck with a hood and drawstrings, full raglan sleeves with a grey knitted band above the cuffs and a grey patch on the elbows, one pocket in the middle with asymmetric openings on either sides, grey knitted band above the hem and Big Ben logo embroidered on the left chestFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsSubtle and stylish, this green sweater from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The branding on the chest enhances your royal fashion statement, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Layer this over tees, with jeans and sports shoesModel statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
